description_long: This is a tall, round wooden stool with a simple, utilitarian design. The seat is circular and flat, made from a single piece of wood with a natural, unfinished appearance. Four straight, slightly splayed legs support the seat, each connected by two sets of horizontal braces for added stability. The braces are arranged in a square pattern, with the lower set positioned closer to the ground and the upper set just below the seat. The wood grain is visible throughout, giving the stool a rustic and sturdy look. There are no decorative elements or upholstery, emphasizing its functional and minimalist style.
description: A tall, round wooden stool with four splayed legs and two sets of horizontal braces, featuring a rustic, minimalist design.
description_view_0: The stool is seen from a slight angle, showing the round seat, four legs, and both sets of horizontal braces.
description_view_1: This view presents the stool directly from the front, highlighting the symmetry of the legs and braces.
description_view_2: The stool is viewed from another angle, similar to view 0, with the round seat and braces clearly visible.
description_view_3: This view mirrors view 1, showing the front of the stool with all four legs and braces aligned.
